title: Finish and review crash-safe node edit/delete PR #1440
goal: Reconcile the unpublished node mutation hardening without overwriting the existing dirty worktree, publish a coherent implementation on current main, verify persistence and concurrency integrity, and stop before merge with an exact downloadable final diff for review.

acceptance.assertion: The existing dirty worktree at /home/alex/repos/.weltgewebe-worktrees/node-edit-delete-v2 is inspected and preserved without reset, cleanup, overwrite or unverified ownership takeover; implementation proceeds in a safely owned path or through an explicitly reconciled continuation.
acceptance.verifier: Git status, process, lease and worktree receipt before first write

acceptance.assertion: The final implementation is based on the then-current origin/main and contains no unresolved merge conflicts or stale generated evidence.
acceptance.verifier: GitHub head/base ancestry and clean worktree receipt

acceptance.assertion: JSONL node deletion cannot leave node and edge projections partially committed after process failure; durable journal recovery, fsync boundaries and failure-injection tests prove rollback or completion across restart.
acceptance.verifier: focused crash/restart and recovery tests bound to final head

acceptance.assertion: Node deletion classifies typed and legacy untyped edge endpoints without deleting account or role references; ambiguous or malformed references fail closed with no partial mutation.
Concurrent edge creation and node deletion cannot produce orphaned projections, and the chosen PostgreSQL lock scope has an explicit bounded performance assessment.
acceptance.verifier: direct PostgreSQL concurrency test plus lock-plan or bounded load evidence

acceptance.assertion: The edit form and replacement API preserve all supported node variants and do not silently make previously optional domain properties mandatory without an explicit product decision and migration.
acceptance.verifier: schema/spec comparison and focused browser/API tests

acceptance.assertion: All required CI, API, PostgreSQL, CodeQL and Web E2E checks pass on the exact final head and the review-evidence gate is valid.
acceptance.verifier: fresh GitHub statusCheckRollup bound to final head

acceptance.assertion: Before merge, the complete current GitHub diff is provided as a separate downloadable or copyable patch with base SHA, head SHA and SHA-256; execution then stops for external review.
acceptance.verifier: artifact stat, hash receipt and explicit no-merge state

observed_state: PR is draft and behind current main.
Review evidence gate is failing while the old required merge gate is green.
The related worktree is one local commit ahead of the remote head and has 21 modified files plus one untracked fixture.
The unpublished diff contains crash-recovery journaling and stricter endpoint-collision handling absent from the current GitHub patch.

review_triage: Accepted: per-node PostgreSQL lock scope, directory fsync, byte-preserving JSONL streaming, cache metric repair, targeted Svelte invalidation, immediate detail-store update, race and large-file tests.
Rejected as false positive: nested location payload mismatch; both TypeScript and Rust use location {lat, lon}.
Existing unpublished hardening preserved: JSONL recovery journal, fail-closed ambiguous endpoint handling and restart recovery tests.
local_evidence: isolated PostgreSQL 16 replace/delete transaction proof: pass

metadata.outcome: PR #1440 was merged after exact-head R3 correctness and data-integrity reviews, all required checks, and real PostgreSQL pool-headroom evidence passed.

validated_acceptance.dirty-worktree-preservation: The isolated worktree was reconciled without resetting or discarding its unpublished hardening and was clean at merge.
validated_acceptance.current-main: Final head 31c649af was based on unchanged main f9271dc and GitHub reported CLEAN/MERGEABLE.
validated_acceptance.jsonl-crash-integrity: Journal, file fsync, directory fsync and restart/failure-injection tests passed.
validated_acceptance.endpoint-ambiguity: JSONL and PostgreSQL collision and malformed-reference paths fail closed without partial mutation.
validated_acceptance.postgres-concurrency: Transactional cascade, stable bigint advisory locks and five concurrent PUTs against a five-connection pool passed.
validated_acceptance.product-contract: Nested location contract is proven by HTTP tests; flat coordinates are rejected without mutation.
validated_acceptance.full-gate: Required merge gate and Review evidence gate passed on exact head 31c649af.
validated_acceptance.external-review-stop: Exact patch and canonical GitHub API diff hashes were recorded before merge.

verification.source: GitHub PR merge, exact-head checks and review-evidence readback
